portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Lunaria — ocean mage, navigator. tall, silver-blue long wavy hair, violet eyes, ethereal beauty. Wearing ocean mage robe with wave patterns, pearl necklace, moon brooch. Holding/carrying coral staff, floating water droplets. Special details: hair moves like waves even without wind, moonlight reflected in eyes. Expression: mystical yet approachable, moon-obsessed. Set in Britalia region with harbor, ocean, pirate atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
